raw_consumer_statement: I enrolled in a financial hardship program with AMEX. I signed up to the program with my XXXX XXXX  account. I immediately requested to cancel my enrollment. AMEX customer service representative told me that I was not allowed to unenroll from the program. I called back and spoke with a different representative who then honored my request, and informed me that he had unenrolled me from the program. I haven't received any confirmation email that that actually happened. There was no money in my XXXX XXXX  account, so AMEX used information from another account ( XXXX XXXX XXXX ) that I had previously used for making payments to my card and initiated an ACH transfer that I did not authorize. AMEX withdrew {$120.00} from my XXXX XXXX XXXX account without my consent. I have filed a dispute with XXXX XXXX XXXX, and AMEX has been completely uncooperative.
